title: Forecasting for monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello champs!

We are developing a forecasting feature for monday.com boards. It will allow you to use A.I. to forecast things directly in monday.com. The first use cases will be inventory, workforce and metrics (sales, order intake, etc.) forecasts.

If you are interested in testing it, please reach out or just comment here.

Thanks!

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml: YES!!! Would love to test it @ilia510

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml: Here is a small example of Daily and Monthly Forecasts

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Radek_Benlemi , can you please send me a direct message with your email, so I can send you a message?

@ElenaK - sent you a message!

posts.author: amy.westlake (Amy Westlake)
posts.cookedHtml: If this is still an option, I’d love to help test as we’re trying to build out a forecasting process as we speak.

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amy.westlake, sure. We are in testing mode and would love to work with your use case.

You will need account in our platform. Once registered, you will get access to the feature and we can have a brief chat so I can show how to build your first forecast.

You will have an extended trial during testing.

Would that be ok? Feel free to send me any question via DM.

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

Forecasting is now available on our platform for monday.com.
Feel free to create an account and start using it.

Also, I will add to each new account a test model which you can use to play with forecasts.

Guides:

  • setting up the model - Forecasting in monday.com - Part 1: Preparing Data & creating a model in Bitskout - YouTube
  • running forecasts - Forecasting in monday.com - Part 2: Creating forecasts for Sales - YouTube

Feel free to send any question or book a free demo call to discuss your case or questions.

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @catwsnyder !

I’d be happy to discuss it. What is the best way to reach out to you?

Optionally, you can contact me via chat on our website to avoid posting emails here.

Cheers!
Ilia

posts.author: catwsnyder (Catherine Snyder)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d love to schedule a meeting for Friday – what’s your availability for the East Coast?

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml: @catwsnyder, I am pretty flexible starting from 06:30 EST and till 10:00 and then after 14:00 till 17:00.

posts.author: ilia510 (Ilia Zelenkin)
posts.cookedHtml: @catwsnyder, Yep. works for me.

posts.author: catwsnyder (Catherine Snyder)
posts.cookedHtml: Great – we can join this link at 3pm EST today - https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_MGFlNWNkYTQtNTBkMC00ZjViLWE2MDgtNzg3YjI5MWRjNzkz%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22f6b6b4df-09b5-4a70-9a89-a85b04f815cb%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%22917bd695-f8ac-482a-b162-9792f0e51871%22%7d
